selectedOwner: HGI-306 boundary retention decision plus boundary and control-policy fixtures
decision: Reject the wildcard replacement. Retain all 18 occurrence-specific exceptions until a candidate proves exact-match, duplicate-rejection, occurrence-isolation, and stale-detection equivalence against the real audit.
evidenceRequired: Decision count matches the exact 18-row registry.
Boundary and control-policy tests reject duplicates and weakened equivalence.
limitations: This decision retains measured complexity; it does not claim the registry can never be replaced.
nonClaims: Line-count reduction is not equivalence, effectiveness, or lower carrying cost.
rollbackRevocation: Restore the exact occurrence registry and rerun boundary fixtures if a replacement loses any preserved property.
